creator: howardjp@wam.umd.edu
text:
Cursive is a simple program that takes input and prints out an 
ASCIIfied cursive version, example:

FreeBSD
   _____           __   ()     __
    /  '          /  )  /\    /  )
 ,-/-, __  _  _  /--<  /  )  /  /
(_/   / (_(/_(/_/___/ /__/__/__/_

How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
